---
description: "Plan and implement a new feature for ScienceLycée end-to-end"
agent: "Orchestrateur"
argument-hint: "Describe the feature you want to add"
---
Plan and implement a complete feature for ScienceLycée. This will:

1. Decompose the feature into implementation steps
2. Delegate to the Implementer for model + view + template + URL
3. Generate migrations if needed (migration-writer)
4. Write tests (test-writer)
5. Run a security review if the feature touches user data (security-review)

Describe the feature and I'll handle the orchestration.
